<|channel|>analysis<|message|>We need to analyze the transcript to determine which player is likely a Werewolf. We have five players: Justin, Dan, Mitchell, Caitlynn, Mike. The transcript is messy; many lines are unclear. We need to parse the actions.

We need to deduce roles based on the transcript. The transcript seems to be from a video, but it's garbled. Let's try to interpret.

We have the night actions: The announcer calls roles in order. The transcript shows the announcer calling "Everyone close your eyes." Then Dan says "Close your eyes." Then the announcer says "Werewolves, wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center." Then Justin says "Robert." That seems odd. Maybe Justin is the werewolf? Or maybe "Robert" is a name? Not sure.

Then the announcer says "Seer, wake up. You may look at another player's card or two of the center cards. Seer, close your eyes." Then the announcer says "Robber, wake up. You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card. Robber, close your eyes." Then "Troublemaker. Wake up. You may exchange cards between two other players. Troublemaker, close your eyes." Then "Everyone. Keep your eyes closed and reach out and move your card around-" This seems like the troublemaker is swapping cards.

Then we see Dan says "Here it is. Found it!" Mike says "I almost got one from the center." Mitchell says "Yeah I keep thinking of doing that." Then the announcer says "Everyone. Wake up." Then we see a conversation about who is who.

It seems the transcript is incomplete and confusing. We need to guess which player is a werewolf.

We need to consider the roles: There are 5 players, so 5 roles plus 3 center cards. The roles available: Doppelganger, Drunk, Hunter, Insomniac, Mason, Minion, Robber, Seer, Tanner, Troublemaker, Villager, Werewolf. In a 5-player game, there will be 5 roles assigned to players, and 3 center cards. The roles chosen may include up to 2 Masons, etc. We don't know which roles were chosen.

We need to infer from the transcript. The transcript is not clear. But we can try to deduce.

Let's parse the transcript step by step:

Line numbers:

[1] Announcer: Everyone close your eyes.
[2] Dan: Close your eyes.
[3] Announcer: Werewolves, wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center.
[4] Justin: Robert.
[5] Announcer: Seer, wake up. You may look at another player's card or two of the center cards. Seer, close your eyes.
[6] Announcer: Robber, wake up. You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card. Robber, close your eyes.
[7] Announcer: Troublemaker. Wake up. You may exchange cards between two other players. Troublemaker, close your eyes.
[8] Announcer: Everyone. Keep your eyes closed and reach out and move your card around-
[9] Dan: Here it is. Found it!
[10] Mike: I almost got one from the center.
[11] Mitchell: Yeah I keep thinking of doing that.
[12] Announcer: Everyone. Wake up.
[13] Mitchell: Were we- He puts those-
[14] Dan: 'Kay.
[15] Dan: What?
[16] Mitchell: Oh, me and Justin. Just declared what the other ones are.
[17] Dan: What?
[18] Mike: All right.
[19] Justin: Am I Troublemaker?
[20] Mike: Yeah.
[21] Mitchell: So then-
[22] Mike: So he's it.
[23] Mitchell: Dan, you can call out what he was.
[24] Justin: Dan what were you?
[25] Mitchell: It's all up to you Dan, what was he?
[26] Dan: Did I get switched?
[27] Justin: Yeah.
[28] Mitchell: Yeah.
[29] Mike: What were you?
[30] Dan: Oh, I was a villager.
[31] Mike: Oh.
[32] Mitchell: Wow. All of our alibis. Do they check out?
[33] Dan: But a werewolf could have thrown a wrench in the hammer at any point in that long chain of events?
[34] Mitchell: Yes, absolutely.
[35] Caitlynn: A wrench? (maybe)
[36] Justin: So let's go through it in the night. Okay. So at the start, this is what we all are saying we were.
[37] Mike: Yes, in the beginning.
[38] Justin: Correct?
[39] Mitchell: Correct.
[40] Justin: So then-
[41] Mike: Seer. Seer looked-
[42] Justin: I looked at Mitchell.
[43] Mike: It is a villager.
[44] Justin: Saw a villager.
[45] Mitchell: And I confirm he's a seer because I was confident that I am truly-
[46] Mike: Robber?
[47] Justin: You switched with me?
[48] Mitchell: Nope, me.
[49] Caitl... (Caitlynn) says "No. I switched with Mitchell."
[50] Justin: Mitchell? And then-
[51] Mike: Troublemaker.
[52] Caitlynn: I think it was Professor... (some random comment)
[53] Justin: Guys, I think we work together so well without any hesitation, I feel like we all just need to vote left.
[54] Mitchell: I'm with you, and if werewolves win this round...
[55] Justin: Yeah they're like-
[56] Mitchell: They're amazing.
[57] Justin: They're like the best werewolves ever.
[58] Mitchell: You f*cking just...
[59] Mitchell: Just-
[60] Mitchell: Out played us...
[61] Mitchell: Wait, Dan, do you agree that we should just [inaudible 00:02:41]?
[62] Dan: Yeah, no I agree.
[63] Justin: So everyone vote to your left?
[64] Mike: Yes. Okay.
[65] Dan: And that ties it up.
[66] Announcer: Time is up. Everyone-
[67] Dan: I was kidding.

<|channel|>analysis<|message|>We need to analyze the transcript to determine which player is likely a Werewolf. We have five players: Justin, Dan, Mitchell, Caitlynn, Mike. The transcript is messy; many lines are unclear. We need to parse the actions.

We need to deduce roles based on the transcript. The transcript seems to be from a video, but it's garbled. Let's try to interpret.

We have the night actions: The announcer calls roles in order. The transcript shows the announcer calling "Everyone close your eyes." Then Dan says "Close your eyes." Then the announcer says "Werewolves, wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center." Then Justin says "Robert." That seems odd. Maybe Justin is the werewolf? Or maybe "Robert" is a name? Not sure.

Then the announcer says "Seer, wake up. You may look at another player's card or two of the center cards. Seer, close your eyes." Then the announcer says "Robber, wake up. You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card. Robber, close your eyes." Then "Troublemaker. Wake up. You may exchange cards between two other players. Troublemaker, close your eyes." Then "Everyone. Keep your eyes closed and reach out and move your card around-" This seems like the troublemaker is swapping cards.

Then we see Dan says "Here it is. Found it!" Mike says "I almost got one from the center." Mitchell says "Yeah I keep thinking of doing that." Then the announcer says "Everyone. Wake up." Then we see a conversation about who is who.

It seems the transcript is incomplete and confusing. We need to guess which player is a werewolf.

We need to consider the roles: There are 5 players, so 5 roles plus 3 center cards. The roles available: Doppelganger, Drunk, Hunter, Insomniac, Mason, Minion, Robber, Seer, Tanner, Troublemaker, Villager, Werewolf. In a 5-player game, there will be 5 roles assigned to players, and 3 center cards. The roles chosen may include up to 2 Masons, etc. We don't know which roles were chosen.

We need to infer from the transcript. The transcript is not clear. But we can try to deduce.

Let's parse the transcript step by step:

Line numbers:

[1] Announcer: Everyone close your eyes.
[2] Dan: Close your eyes.
[3] Announcer: Werewolves, wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center.
[4] Justin: Robert.
[5] Announcer: Seer, wake up. You may look at another player's card or two of the center cards. Seer, close your eyes.
[6] Announcer: Robber, wake up. You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card. Robber, close your eyes.
[7] Announcer: Troublemaker. Wake up. You may exchange cards between two other players. Troublemaker, close your eyes.
[8] Announcer: Everyone. Keep your eyes closed and reach out and move your card around-
[9] Dan: Here it is. Found it!
[10] Mike: I almost got one from the center.
[11] Mitchell: Yeah I keep thinking of doing that.
[12] Announcer: Everyone. Wake up.
[13] Mitchell: Were we- He puts those-
[14] Dan: 'Kay.
[15] Dan: What?
[16] Mitchell: Oh, me and Justin. Just declared what the other ones are.
[17] Dan: What?
[18] Mike: All right.

[20] Mike: Yeah.
[21] Mitchell: So then-

[27] Justin: Yeah.

[42] Justin: I looked at Mitchell.
[43] Mike: It is a villager.
